extDesc.message: Automatically finds and highlights your saved keywords on the current page. Useful for skimming and reviewing text.

keyboardHelp.message: Use Tab to move between controls. Press Enter or Space to activate buttons.

wordListHelp.message: In each saved keyword row, use the color control to change the marker color or the delete button to remove the keyword.

onboardingGuide.message: Add just one word to mark matching text on the page you have open.

noWords.message: No keywords yet. Add a keyword you want to find on the page.

emptyStateDescription.message: Saved words are marked anywhere they match on the page you have open.

emptyStateGuide.message: One step: type a word in the field above, then choose Add.

emptyStateExample.message: Examples: product names, project names, or phrases to review.

emptyStateAction.message: Use the guided field above to add your first keyword.

limitReachedOne.message: The free plan allows up to $LIMIT$ saved keyword.

limitReachedOther.message: The free plan allows up to $LIMIT$ saved keywords.

trialPeriodOne.message: $DAYS$ day left in the free trial.

trialPeriodOther.message: $DAYS$ days left in the free trial.
